folder_documents.title: 每日风控总结 - 2026-03-26 (00:00 - 23:59)
folder_documents.content:
📊 **每日风控总结**
📅 统计周期：2026-03-26 00:00 ~ 2026-03-26 23:59

**1️⃣ Index Alarm** ｜ 3条→2事件
🔴 CRCL 指数成分报价偏离 4.2%，多个来源在 15:00-16:00 HKT 同时抖动。
🟠 ONT 指数成分短时缺失 12 分钟后恢复。
💡 建议：
① 复核 CRCL 指数源权重与降级逻辑

**2️⃣ Price Limit — P4** ｜ 4条（去重3条，2个合约）
🔴 CRCL-USDT-SWAP Z cap 硬顶触发 2 次，涉及 UID 612133499092760604，master_user_id 62247621。
🟠 ONT-USDT-SWAP 内带多次触发，涉及 UID 612133499092760605，master_user_id 62247622。
🟡 CRCL-USDT 现货限价接近下边界，涉及 UID 612133499092760604。
💡 建议：
① 优先复核 CRCL 相关参数与盘口行为

**3️⃣ Collateral Coin Risk** ｜ 2条
🟠 BANANA borrow/limit 96.2%，已触发下单限制，关联 UID 612133499092760604。
🟡 ZENT borrow/limit 84.1%，尚未触发 FRP，关联 UID 612133499092760606，master_user_id 62247623。

**4️⃣ Platform OI** ｜ 3条
🔴 CRCL OI 较24H均值偏离 56.15%，涉及 UID 612133499092760604，master_user_id 62247621。
🔴 CRCL OI/平台限额占比 82%，涉及 UID 612133499092760606，master_user_id 62247623。
🟠 ONT OI/流通市值占比 13.4%，涉及 UID 612133499092760605，master_user_id 62247622。
⚠️ AI汇总，关键数据请以原始报警为准

612133499092760604.executive_summary: Newer account with fast trading activation, concentrated CRCL exposure, and repeated appearance across price-limit, collateral, and OI alerts.
key_evidence: CRCL exposure appears across multiple alert types in the same day.
Collateral pressure and OI concentration line up with the observed market stress window.

dimensions.name: Comprehensive Judgment
signals: Combined pattern is consistent with a high-priority manipulation review candidate.

key_evidence: Appears in both Price Limit P4 and Platform OI sections.
Current evidence points to concentration rather than a fully matched attack pattern.
